channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: SOL eyes a reversal: oversold setup + bounce near $81.4 could spark a run to $90-95, but bears hold until SOL clears $87.50. 🔒 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260430-price-prediction-target-sol-90-within-two-weeks-as-oversold #SOL #Crypto #Trading
